records.question: Who are the female students named Smith from BAL city, aged at least 18, with advisor number at most 1121 and major code no more than 600, who have pets weighing exactly 12.0 and aged at least 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN has_pet ON student.stuid = has_pet.stuid
JOIN pets ON has_pet.petid = pets.petid
WHERE student.advisor <= 1121 AND student.age >= 18 AND student.sex = 'F' AND pets.weight = 12.0 AND pets.pet_age >= 3 AND student.major <= 600 AND student.lname = 'Smith' AND student.city_code = 'BAL'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Student.StuID
FROM Student
JOIN Has_Pet ON Student.StuID = Has_Pet.StuID
JOIN Pets ON Has_Pet.PetID = Pets.PetID
WHERE Student.Advisor <= 1121
  AND Student.Age >= 18
  AND Student.Sex = 'F'
  AND Student.Major <= 600
  AND Student.LName = 'Smith'
  AND Student.city_code = 'BAL'
  AND Pets.weight = 12.0
  AND Pets.pet_age >= 3
GROUP BY Student.StuID

records.question: Which students with the last name Kim, age at most 19, advisor number no more than 7712, and major no more than 600 have pets?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN has_pet ON student.stuid = has_pet.stuid
WHERE student.age <= 19 AND student.lname = 'Kim' AND student.advisor <= 7712 AND student.major <= 600
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Student.StuID
FROM Student
WHERE Age <= 19
  AND LName = 'Kim'
  AND Advisor <= 7712
  AND Major <= 600
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Has_Pet
      WHERE Has_Pet.StuID = Student.StuID
  )
